---
id: put-v-1-employees-employee-id-payment-method
title: "Update payment method for an employee"
description: "Updates the payment method for an employee. Can set to Check or Direct Deposit with split configuration."
sidebar_label: "Update payment method for an employee"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "put api-method"
info_path: docs/api/gusto-api
custom_edit_url: null

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Update payment method for an employee"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/v1/employees/{employee_id}/payment_method"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Updates the payment method for an employee. Can set to Check or Direct Deposit with split configuration.

scope: `employee_payment_methods:write`

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
